member.name: T:DemoApi.Controllers.PizzaController
member.summary: Web Api Actions for Pizza Application

member.name: M:DemoApi.Controllers.PizzaController.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{DemoApi.Models.Pizza})
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:DemoApi.Controllers.PizzaController.GetAll
member.summary: Get all the pizza model objects in memory

member.name: M:DemoApi.Controllers.PizzaController.Get(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get one specific pizza given a unique identifier (int)
member.returns: (Pizza) one pizza model object if it exists, not found otherwise

member.name: M:DemoApi.Controllers.PizzaController.GetErrorDemo(System.Int32)
member.summary: Demo of Custom Error Handling for Get Operation
member.returns: (Pizza) one pizza model object if it exists, not found otherwise

member.name: M:DemoApi.Controllers.PizzaController.HandleOptions
member.summary: Creates a pizza and automatically assigns a unique identifier (int)
member.returns: (Pizza) pizza that was created with the assigned unique identifier (int)

member.name: M:DemoApi.Controllers.PizzaController.Update(System.Int32,DemoApi.Models.Pizza)
member.summary: Updates a specific pizza given a unique identifier (int), if it exists

member.name: M:DemoApi.Controllers.PizzaController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a specific pizza given a unique identifier, if it exists

member.name: T:DemoApi.Models.Pizza
member.summary: Simple Pizza

member.name: P:DemoApi.Models.Pizza.Id
member.summary: Unique Identifier (int) for Pizza

member.name: P:DemoApi.Models.Pizza.Name
member.summary: Name of the Pizza (string)

member.name: P:DemoApi.Models.Pizza.IsGlutenFree
member.summary: Is this Pizza Gluten Free (bool true --> yes)

member.name: T:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService
member.summary: Service Layer for Pizza CRUD Actions

member.name: P:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService.Pizzas
member.summary: In-memory static list of Pizzas (mock of database later)

member.name: F:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService.nextId
member.summary: Unique Identifier Pointer (int) (for assignment of new pizza identifiers) (mock of database layer)

member.name: M:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService.#cctor
member.summary: Constructor Creates new static list of pizzas

member.name: M:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService.GetAll
member.summary: Retrieves all pizzas from in-memory

member.name: M:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService.Get(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves one pizza from in-memory that matches the identifier
member.returns: A single pizza (pizza that matches the identifier)

member.name: M:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService.Add(DemoApi.Models.Pizza)
member.summary: Adds (Creates) a new Pizza model object to the static list of pizzas

member.name: M:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a specific pizza with a unique identifier

member.name: M:DemoApi.Services.PizzaService.Update(DemoApi.Models.Pizza)
member.summary: Replaces (entire) Pizza model object given a whole Pizza model object with the same unique identifier
member.param: (Pizza) pizza to replace in the list
